race.comment: THE STARS ALIGN (8) missed the start as favourite at Canberra but it didn't matter, winding up powerfully to reel them in with something in hand. Hard not to take him seriously off that and there's no reason he can't bring up the hat trick now. GREY LAD (5) got things back on track at Wodonga, sticking on for a minor placing after leading them into the lane. He's at peak fitness and gets weight relief again with the 3kg claimer sticking. OUTCAST GIRL (11) was good first up behind Xcessive Force at Goulburn but hasn't gone on with it since. Heywood going on suggests stable confidence, so she's worth another chance. Last-start winner GHOST WALKER (3) cops a big weight but can make an impact again.
